## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between AfterShoot and GrowthX to discuss content production, SEO performance, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production process needs streamlining: focus on keyword research approval, outline creation in batches, and clearer stage definitions](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [SEO performance reporting to be enhanced with weekly/monthly views and more actionable insights](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Shift meeting focus from operational details to strategic discussions and performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Aim to approve keywords for the next quarter to build a content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Process Improvements

  - [Keyword research and approval identified as a bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Plan to approve keywords in bulk for next quarter's content](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Aim to create 10 outlines in the next week to build a backlog](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Need to clarify and streamline stages in the production process](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Update tracking spreadsheet to serve as a single source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)

### SEO Performance Reporting

  - [Current daily view less useful; weekly and monthly views to be added](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Need to surface high-performing and declining URLs for strategic discussions](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Include recommendations for on-page and off-page optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Add cohort tagging to sharpen content approach](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### Operational Efficiency

  - [GrowthX team to take over banner image creation to speed up publishing](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Clarify photographer review process for technical articles](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Ensure all edits and comments are finalized before moving to next stage](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Use tracking spreadsheet consistently to show current stage of each piece](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)

### Content Quality and Alignment

  - [Recent outlines show improved alignment with editorial comments](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [SEO considerations to be addressed earlier in the process (keyword research stage)](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
  - [AfterShoot team to provide additional context/references during keyword approval](https://fathom.video/share/fMpgdycVEpbRsQnL1cG98FxeuAchmH45?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

## Next Steps

1.  GrowthX to clarify process steps and update tracking spreadsheet by Friday
2.  Create batch of 10 outlines to build content backlog
3.  AfterShoot to share banner image process with David
4.  Jakub to update performance report with weekly/monthly views
5.  Monalisa to share conversion data (carried over from previous meeting)
6.  Both teams to review and align on process steps in Slack
7.  Implement new tracking system in spreadsheet for clearer stage definitions
8.  Shift future meetings to focus more on strategic discussions and performance analysis
